vite.config.ts.description: Vite configuration with React, Tailwind CSS v4 plugins, and widget library build mode (--mode widget)

src/index.css.description: Global design system — semantic color tokens (light + dark), chat-specific tokens (user/bot bubble colors), gradients, shadows, transitions, typography scale, @theme inline block for Tailwind v4, keyframe animations (fade-in, bounce-dot, shimmer, float), and utility classes (text-gradient, focus-ring, glass, gradient-border, shine-on-hover, chat-scrollbar, typing-dots, thinking-indicator, thinking-shimmer-bar, bubble-tail, stagger-children)

src/main.tsx.description: React app entry point — renders App into root, imports index.css

src/App.tsx.description: Root app component — flex layout with persistent sidebar (desktop) / overlay sidebar (mobile) + main area. Hamburger hidden on desktop, mobile branding in header. Sidebar close only triggers on mobile. Manages messages, file uploads, loading/streaming state, sidebar toggle, and theme toggle. Uses sendMessageStream() with onChunk callbacks for real-time text streaming. Tracks activeFiles for AI context. Passes activeFiles to ConversationView for indicator bar.

src/types/chat.ts.description: TypeScript interfaces — UploadedFile (fileId, fileName, fileType, summary, data), Message (id, role, content, timestamp, attachedFiles?), ChatState

src/config/system-prompt.ts.description: System prompt for 10x Analyst AI — data analysis, business metrics, visualization recommendations, comparative analysis, forecasting, data quality. No topic restrictions.

src/services/ai.ts.description: AI service — SSE streaming via sendMessageStream() with onChunk/onDone/onError callbacks. Parses Anthropic-compatible SSE events (content_block_delta). Falls back to non-streaming on failure. Legacy sendMessage() kept for widget compatibility.

api_shape.body: { model, max_tokens, stream: true, system, messages }
api_shape.response: SSE stream (content_block_delta events with text deltas)

src/services/fileUpload.ts.description: File upload service — uploadFile() sends file via FormData to POST /api/upload, fetchChatFiles() fetches files for a chat via GET /api/chats/:id/files

src/services/chatStore.ts.description: Chat persistence service — CRUD for chats and messages via Express backend at localhost:3001

src/components/Sidebar.tsx.description: Left sidebar — persistent on desktop (lg+), overlay on mobile. Navigation items, recent chats list, theme toggle. Header shows '10x Analyst' branding. Collapse button hidden on desktop.

src/components/WelcomeView.tsx.description: Welcome state — gradient greeting text with ambient glow decoration, floating Sparkles icon, input box with focus glow shadow, 5 analysis-focused quick action pills with hover lift/shadow/icon color change (Upload CSV triggers file picker + auto-send, Data Analysis, Insights, Compare, Summarize). Send button has stronger active press feedback (0.92 scale).

src/components/MessageItem.tsx.description: Flat message rendering — 'You' label for user, '10x Analyst' with bot icon for assistant. Shows FileChip for attachedFiles. Inline markdown formatting. Blinking cursor shown during streaming via isStreaming prop. No typewriter hook — content rendered directly.

src/components/ChatInput.tsx.description: Chat input with file upload — rounded-2xl box with textarea, FileUploadButton on left, '10x Analyst' label + send arrow on right. Shows FileChip for each attached file. onSend passes (message, files?).

src/components/FileChip.tsx.description: File chip/pill — type-specific colored icons (green for CSV/Excel, red for PDF, blue for text/MD) with left border accent, truncated file name, optional remove button. Supports compact mode for inline use. Hover effects with shadow-xs.

src/components/FileUploadButton.tsx.description: File upload button — wraps hidden file input, shows Plus icon or Loader2 spinner while uploading. Accepts .csv, .xlsx, .xls, .pdf, .txt, .md files. Calls uploadFile() service and notifies parent via onFileUploaded.

src/components/ConversationView.tsx.description: Chat conversation state — scrollable message list with MessageItem rendering, shimmer thinking indicator, auto-scroll, active files indicator bar (collapsible, shows file count + compact FileChips), ChatInput disabled during loading/streaming.

src/components/ChatHeader.tsx.description: [DEPRECATED] Old chat header — replaced by Sidebar navigation. Kept for widget mode compatibility.

src/components/MessageBubble.tsx.description: [DEPRECATED] Old bubble-style message rendering — replaced by MessageItem.tsx. Kept for widget mode compatibility.

src/components/TypingIndicator.tsx.description: Typing indicator — 3 bouncing dots in a bot-style bubble, uses .typing-dots CSS class

src/components/ChatWindow.tsx.description: [DEPRECATED] Old chat message window — replaced by ConversationView.tsx. Kept for widget mode compatibility.

src/components/ChatWidget.tsx.description: Embeddable chat widget — floating button (bottom-right) that opens a popup chat panel, full-screen on mobile, contains full chat UI

src/widget.tsx.description: Widget entry point — creates a container div, renders ChatWidget, imports CSS, self-mounts on any page

widget-embed.html.description: Example HTML page showing how to embed the PM Chatbot widget via script + link tags

server/db.ts.description: SQLite database setup — chats, messages, and uploaded_files tables with prepared statements for CRUD operations

server/index.ts.description: Express server — chat CRUD endpoints + file upload/parse endpoint + files-per-chat endpoint

server/fileParser.ts.description: File parser module — parses CSV, Excel, PDF, and text files into structured ParsedFile objects with summaries and formatted data for AI consumption
